name: daisyui-colors
tagline: Defines daisyUI 5 semantic color names, usage rules, and a custom-theme CSS example for Tailwind CSS 4.
verdict: Concrete, actionable color rules with a full worked custom-theme example. Weak dispatch signal - description doesn't state when to trigger - and no negative-trigger guidance or versioning signal (no version field, changelog, or dates anywhere).

highlights.summary: Description 'MANDATORY color usage rules for daisyUI 5' states topic but no explicit usage trigger/scenario.
No exclusions or 'NOT for' guidance anywhere in the file.
No version field, changelog, or dated revision notes anywhere in frontmatter or body.
